zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance von Babenberg於1212年5月6日出生在奧地利斯泰爾馬可時，她的父親Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria35歲，母親Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi34歲。她於1234年5月1日與Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen在奧地利維恩結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1243年6月5日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance von Babenberg于1212年5月6日出生在奥地利斯泰爾馬可时，她的父亲Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria35岁，母亲Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi34岁。她于1234年5月1日与Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen在奥地利維恩结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1243年6月5日之前。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Babenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rabenberg, as for example in Saxony or Lower Saxony.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance von Babenberg was born on 6 May 1212, in Styria, Austria, her father, Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria, was 35 and her mother, Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi, was 34. She married Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen on 1 May 1234, in Vienna, Austria. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died before 5 June 1243.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance von Babenberg est née le 6 mai 1212, à Styrie, Autriche, son père, Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen le 1 mai 1234, à Vienne, Autriche. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée avant 5 juin 1243.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance von Babenberg am 6. Mai 1212 in Steiermark, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria 35 und ihre Mutter Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi 34. Sie hat am 1. Mai 1234 in Wien, Österreich Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb vor 5. Juni 1243.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance von Babenberg è nata il il 6 maggio 1212 nel Steiermark, Austria, sua padre, Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen il 1 maggio 1234, nel Wien, Austria. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del 5 giugno 1243.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance von Babenbergが1212年5月6日にオーストリアステイエルマークで生まれた時，父Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styriaは35歳，母Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-háziは34歳であった。1234年5月1日にオーストリアウィンでHeinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1243年6月5日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance von Babenberg(이)가 1212년 5월 6일 오스트리아 스테이마크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1234년 5월 1일 오스트리아 빈에서 Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 6월 5일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance von Babenberg nasceu em 6 de maio de 1212, em Steiermark, Áustria, seu pai, Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen em 1 de maio de 1234, em Wien, Áustria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu antes 5 de junho de 1243.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance von Babenberg родилась 6 мая 1212 г. в местности стиирмарк, Австрия, её отцу по имени Leopold VI Of Austria duke of Austria duke of Austria and Styria было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Theodora Angelina Komnenos Angelos-házi, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich III. der Erlauchte von Meißen 1 мая 1234 г. в местности Вена, Австрия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла перед 5 июнь 1243 г.
